pages.title: Zombie
pages.text: $(rev)Corpus entry:$(warn) fragments torn from Zombie donors keep their cultural locomotion hints even when stitched elsewhere.

pages.title: Recorded anatomy
pages.text: Torso, Arms, Legs — the baseline shambling donor.

pages.title: Stitcher's marginalia
pages.text: Ideal filler limbs when you crave classic green gait without rare drops.
